summary: TypeSpec migration from Swagger (5.3.0 → 6.0.0-beta.1). Versions consistent across package.json, context file, and CHANGELOG.md. No _N suffixes, AutoGenerated suffixes, _ prefixes, unknown/void issues, or forgotten exports found. AzureClouds enum uses UPPER_SNAKE_CASE and AzureSupportedClouds uses closed template literal type, but these are not violations per the explicit guidelines rules.
notes: AzureClouds/AzureSupportedClouds pattern present (same as arm-azurestackhci, arm-containerservicefleet, arm-standbypool) but not flagged as not in strict guidelines.
